message:
Add RAII snapshot cleanup for share export and best-effort DB open for robot attachments

Share export: Introduce SnapshotCleanupGuard RAII struct that ensures
the temporary SQLite snapshot is always removed, even when export fails
mid-way (e.g. invalid signing key). Replaces fire-and-forget
remove_file with Drop-based cleanup and explicit error propagation.

Robot attachments: Switch from open_db_sync() to open_db_sync_robot()
so reads succeed even when another process holds a SQLite reserved lock.
Add tracing dependency for fallback-path logging. Test verifies the
command completes promptly under active lock contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ crossterm = "0.28.1"
 glob.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
 walkdir.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 nix = { workspace = true, features = ["signal", "process"] }
